meaning: adj.邪恶的,带来麻烦的,不幸的,有害的,诽谤的n.邪恶,不幸,罪恶
examples: Good and evil may co-exist within one family.
He said that we were evil, malignant, and mean.
You cannot pretend there's no evil in the world.
How can a simmering tureen of tripe stock look so evil, yet smell so good?
Nintendo believed that signing Capcom to an exclusive deal would grab the Resident Evil fanbase.
